evidence: standards/enterprise/modern-testing.md, ADR-0011, and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A framework or TDD-boundary exception records the executable behavior, capability gap, risk, owner, temporary evidence, expiry, and migration plan; documentation is never relabeled as executable behavior.
statement: Teams MUST choose Swift Testing or XCTest by required capability and repository compatibility, and MUST apply TDD only to executable behavior whose risk warrants test-first development.
